ValidationRule.description: City Tier 1, 2, 3 limits must be non-negative when specified.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(City_Tier_1_Limit__c)), City_Tier_1_Limit__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(City_Tier_2_Limit__c)), City_Tier_2_Limit__c < 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(City_Tier_3_Limit__c)), City_Tier_3_Limit__c < 0) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: City Tier limits must be non-negative.
